articles.title: Sony Pictures at CinemaCon 2026: Everything Revealed (Updating Live!) - IGN
articles.description: From Spider-Man: Brand New Day to Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse to Jumanji: Open World to an R-Rated animated Bloodborne movie, here all the big reveals from Sony Pictures Entertainment's CinemaCon 2026 presentation.

articles.title: Justin Bieber’s YouTube Coachella set had nothing to do with who owns his music - The Verge
articles.description: During his set at Coachella, Justin Bieber played clips of older songs off YouTube, and while the Daily Mail speculates that he couldn’t play full versions because he sold his catalog, experts say that’s not true.
